message:
fix: unsling falls back to status query when agent bead missing or hook_bead empty (gt-dzbyd)

When agent bead does not exist (crew members) or hook_bead field is already
cleared, gt unsling now queries for beads with status=hooked assigned to the
agent, matching runMoleculeStatus fallback behavior. ClearHookBead is now
conditional on agent bead existence and non-fatal on failure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
